title: Missing girl found
description: GEORGE NEWS - The search for the 14-year-old...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The search for the 14-year-old Geraldine Kammies from George came to an end on Tuesday 28 October when the police found her at a house in Thembalethu.


> She has since been reunited with her family.


Geraldine was reported missing at the Conville Police Station after she had left her home in Galjoen Street, Maraiskamp, on Wednesday 22 October to go to school, but never arrived.

The investigating officer thanked the public for their assistance and support during the search.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
